metadata.name: winter
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Application Frameworks
metadata.summary: Web Framework with focus on python typing, dataclasses and modular design

methods.name: winter_ddd.domain_event_dispatcher.DomainEventDispatcher._execute_handler
documentation: The method is intentionally extracted to make it possible to override it externally for logging purposes.

functions.name: winter_openapi.generator.determine_path_prefix
documentation:
https://github.com/encode/django-rest-framework/blob/master/LICENSE.md
THIS SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED BY THE COPYRIGHT HOLDERS AND CONTRIBUTORS "AS IS" AND ANY EXPRESS OR IMPLIED WARRANTIES,

WHETHER IN CONTRACT, STRICT LIABILITY, OR TORT (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE OR OTHERWISE) ARISING IN ANY WAY OUT OF THE
USE OF THIS SOFTWARE, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE.

Given a list of all paths, return the common prefix which should be
discounted when generating a schema structure.

This will be the longest common string that does not include that last
component of the URL, or the last component before a path parameter.

For example:

/api/v1/users/
/api/v1/users/{pk}/

The path prefix is '/api/v1'

methods.name: winter.messaging.event_dispacher.EventDispatcher._execute_handler
documentation: The method is intentionally extracted to make it possible to override it externally for logging purposes.

classes.name: winter.web.output_processor.IOutputProcessor
documentation:
Process API method returned value so that it can be put to HttpResponse body.
Common usage is to serializer some DTO to dict.

classes.name: winter.web.output_processor.IOutputProcessorResolver
documentation:
Resolves IOutputProcessor for a given body type.
Due to python dynamic typing it's called after every API request.

class_variables.name: winter.web.routing.route_annotation.RouteAnnotation.produces
documentation: It's used for swagger only at the moment, but will be used in routing later

class_variables.name: winter.web.routing.route_annotation.RouteAnnotation.consumes
documentation: It's used for swagger only at the moment, but will be used in routing later

functions.name: winter.web.throttling.reset
documentation:
This function allows to reset the accumulated throttling state
for a specific user and scope

functions.name: winter.web.throttling._parse_rate
documentation:
Given the request rate string, return a two tuple of:
<allowed number of requests>, <period of time in seconds>

classes.name: winter.web.response_header_serializer.ResponseHeaderSerializer
documentation: ResponseHeaderSerializer interface is used to convert different response header values to string.

classes.name: winter.web.argument_resolver.ArgumentResolver
documentation: ArgumentResolver interface is used to map http request contents to API method arguments.

classes.name: winter.core.json.undefined.Undefined
documentation: A class to represent an absence of value.

functions.name: winter.core.utils.typing.is_iterable_type
documentation: Note that str is not iterable here
